name: Legal Adaptive Workflow
purpose: Handle legal compose requests when bundled skills are weak or absent.
prompt_fragments: Adapt the response to legal context and emphasize adaptive.
Use the strongest available persona, preferably generated_legal_adaptive_persona, and maintain continuity with the active conversation.
If the domain remains uncertain, expose assumptions and proceed with the closest practical answer instead of blocking.
generated_from_prompt: Create an adaptive persona and workflow for insurance claims compliance escalation with audit controls and research-backed response guidance.
